description:
The TailwindTraders team has shifted to a Sunday-Thursday work schedule and decided to track bugs on the backlog alongside requirements. Update the 'TailwindTraders Team' configuration in Azure DevOps to reflect these changes. Set the team working days to Sunday through Thursday, configure bugs to be managed with requirements, enable 'Epics' visibility in the backlog navigation, and set the default iteration to 'TailwindTraders\Sprint 1'.

Login credentials:
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
